The improved cross-browser consistency is a result of Sinorca’s more comprehensive
            screen stylesheet. Major style parameters are explicitly defined in the stylesheet,

I’ve removed the separate colour scheme stylesheet found in the original version,
            instead incorporating the colour definitions in the single screen stylesheet.
